$comment: Overlay-render gate allow-list. Every overlay HOST (controlled Dialog/Drawer/Sheet) and self-opening TRIGGER (Confirm/Popover/menu) under src/modules must be EITHER rendered open in overlays.tsx OR listed here with a reason. A new overlay that is neither wired nor listed fails `npm run check` (node scripts/gen-overlay-registry.mjs --check). Prefer wiring an open-state entry; use this list only for overlays that are structurally hard to render standalone (deeply nested in a page/section, responsive-only, or an inline confirm reached via a row/card action). See OVERLAY_FINDINGS.md.

hosts.modules/layouts/app-layout/AppLayout: Mobile-nav Sheet, opens ONLY below the responsive breakpoint (a hamburger button that is display:none at the gallery's desktop viewport). Not openable via a store/prop in the standard canvas; would need a viewport override. Tracked for a future narrow-viewport overlay pass.
hosts.modules/chat/components/ChatInput: Composer attach/tools Popover — local open-state, opens on a click inside the live chat composer. The composer is exercised in the chat deep-states; a standalone open needs the full composer context. Tracked for an interaction recipe on the chat surface.
hosts.modules/chat/extensions/voice/components: Composer voice privacy-hint Popover — local open-state, shown once on first use inside the live chat composer (same pattern as ChatInput). Covered by the 14-voice mic e2e specs; tracked for a gallery interaction recipe.
hosts.modules/chat/core/components/ChatRightPa: File-preview Drawer that only appears below the md page-width breakpoint when a file/tab is opened into the right panel (store-driven mobileDrawerOpen). Responsive- + interaction-gated; the wide-viewport side-panel form is exercised on the chat surface. Tracked for a narrow-viewport open recipe.
hosts.modules/llm-provider/components/widgets/: Download-progress Popover — local open-state, only meaningful with an in-flight download in the widget. Reached via the header download indicator; tracked for an interaction recipe.
hosts.modules/file-rag/components/sections/Emb: Config Dialog nested in the embedding section; opens on an in-section 'configure' action once the section has loaded. Section renders on its file-RAG settings page (in the gallery). Tracked for an interaction recipe.
hosts.modules/memory/components/sections/Seman: Result-detail Dialog opens on a search-result row click after a query runs. Section rendered on the memory page; interaction-gated. Tracked for a recipe.
hosts.modules/memory/components/sections/FullT: Result-detail Dialog opens on a search-result row click after a query runs. Section rendered on the memory page; interaction-gated. Tracked for a recipe.
hosts.modules/memory/components/sections/MyMem: Memory-detail Drawer + delete Confirm open on a memory-row action within the section. Section rendered on the memory page; the panel has seeded loading/empty/error coverage. Tracked for a row-open recipe.
hosts.modules/memory/components/CoreMemoryBloc: Add-block Dialog + delete Confirm open on in-editor actions. The editor has seeded loading/empty coverage; the Dialog is interaction-gated. Tracked for a recipe.
hosts.modules/projects/components/ProjectKnowl: Knowledge-file Drawer opens on a knowledge-row action inside the project-detail section. Project detail is rendered in the gallery (seeded deep-state); interaction-gated. Tracked for a recipe.
hosts.modules/chat/components/ConversationCard: Inline controlled delete-Confirm on a conversation row (local open-state, opened by the row's delete button). Reached via the conversation list (rendered in the gallery). Inline confirm — covered by a future list-row interaction recipe.
hosts.modules/file/components/FileCard: Inline controlled delete-Confirm on a file card (local open-state). Reached via any file grid (rendered in the gallery). Inline confirm — future interaction recipe.
hosts.modules/file/components/FileVersionBar: Version-compare Dialog (canvas): opens on the 'Compare with current' button, which is itself only shown when a file has >1 version AND a non-head version is selected. Deeply interaction-gated inside the file panel; needs a multi-version file + version selection to reach. Tracked for a version-history interaction recipe.
hosts.modules/projects/components/ProjectCard: Inline controlled delete-Confirm on a project card (local open-state). Reached via the projects list (rendered in the gallery). Inline confirm — future interaction recipe.
hosts.modules/projects/chat-extension/componen: Inline controlled remove-Confirm on a project-conversation row (local open-state). Reached via the project detail conversations list. Inline confirm — future interaction recipe.
hosts.modules/projects/chat-extension/extensio: Inline controlled remove-from-project Confirm in the conversation-menu extension (local open-state, opened from the conversation kebab menu). Inline confirm — future menu-interaction recipe.
hosts.modules/user/components/user/UsersSettin: Inline controlled activate/deactivate Confirm shared by a user row's Switch + button (local open-state). Reached via the users table (rendered in the gallery). Inline confirm — future row interaction recipe.
hosts.modules/user/components/group/UserGroups: Renders the (separately wired) EditUserGroupDrawer plus an inline group-row Drawer; the standalone drawer is covered by overlay-edit-user-group-drawer. Page rendered in the gallery. Tracked.
hosts.modules/notification/components/Notifica: Notification bell Popover — local open-state, opens on a click on the sidebar bell; the recent-list + empty states are exercised via the notifications e2e spec. Tracked for an interaction recipe.
hosts.modules/knowledge-base/components/Knowle: Inline controlled delete-Confirm on a knowledge-base card (local open-state). Reached via the knowledge list (rendered in the gallery). Inline confirm — future interaction recipe.

triggers.modules/assistant/chat-extension/compone: Composer assistant-picker Popover — opens on a click in the chat composer '+' menu. Reached via the chat surface; tracked for an interaction recipe.
triggers.modules/assistant/pages/AssistantsSettin: Inline delete-Confirm on an assistant row (Confirm trigger child). Page rendered in the gallery; reached via a row delete-button interaction. Tracked.
triggers.modules/assistant/pages/UserAssistantsSe: Inline delete-Confirm on a user-assistant row. Page rendered in the gallery; reached via a row delete-button interaction. Tracked.
triggers.modules/auth-providers/components/AuthPr: Inline delete-Confirm on an auth-provider row. Section rendered on the auth-providers page; reached via a row action. Tracked.
triggers.modules/chat/components/ConversationList: Inline delete-Confirm on a conversation list row. List rendered in the gallery; reached via a row action. Tracked.
triggers.modules/chat/extensions/export/extension: Composer export-format Popover — opens on a click on the 'Export conversation' row in the chat composer '+' menu (same pattern as AssistantMenuItem). Reached via the chat surface; tracked for an interaction recipe.
triggers.modules/file/components/FileExportMenu: File 'Export as…' format Popover — opens on the canvas header export button (same pattern as the chat export extension's format Popover). Reached via the file canvas header; tracked for an interaction recipe.
triggers.modules/citations/components/CitationCar: Inline remove-Confirm on a citation card. Card rendered on the citations page; reached via a card action. Tracked.
triggers.modules/code-sandbox/components/RootfsVe: Inline evict-Confirm on a cached rootfs version row. Rendered on the sandbox settings page; reached via a row action. Tracked.
triggers.modules/file/project-extension/component: Inline detach-Confirm on a project-file row. Panel rendered on the project detail page; reached via a row action. Tracked.
triggers.modules/file/viewers/tabular/ExpandableC: Cell-overflow expand Popover — opens only on a click on a clipped (long) tabular cell inside the CSV/TSV/XLSX viewer. Interaction-gated; covered by the tabular-viewer e2e (cell-overflow expand). Tracked for a gallery interaction recipe.
triggers.modules/hub/modules/installed/components: Inline uninstall-Confirm on an installed-hub-item row. Tab rendered on the hub page; reached via a row action. Tracked.
triggers.modules/llm-local-runtime/components/Run: Inline delete-Confirm on a downloaded runtime version. Card rendered on the local-runtime settings page; reached via a card action. Tracked.
triggers.modules/voice/components/InstalledVersio: Inline delete-Confirm on a downloaded whisper runtime version (same pattern as RuntimeVersionCard). Card rendered on the voice settings page; reached via a card action. Covered by the voice-runtime-admin e2e; tracked.
triggers.modules/llm-provider/components/Provider: Inline delete-provider Confirm in the provider-detail header. Header rendered on the provider detail page; reached via the delete button. Tracked.
triggers.modules/llm-repository/components/LlmRep: Inline delete-repository Confirm on a repository row. Page rendered in the gallery; reached via a row action. Tracked.
triggers.modules/mcp/components/common/McpServerC: Inline delete-Confirm on an MCP server card. Card rendered on the MCP settings page; reached via a card action. Tracked.
triggers.modules/projects/pages/ProjectDetailPage: Inline delete-project Confirm in the project-detail header. Page rendered in the gallery (seeded deep-state); reached via the delete button. Tracked.
triggers.modules/user/components/group/GroupListI: Inline delete-Confirm on a user-group row. List rendered on the groups page; reached via a row action. Tracked.
triggers.modules/workflow/components/WorkflowRuns: Inline delete-run Confirm on a workflow-run row. List rendered on the workflow detail; reached via a row action. Tracked.
triggers.modules/knowledge-base/chat-extension/co: Composer knowledge-base picker Popover — opens on a click in the chat composer '+' menu (same pattern as AssistantMenuItem). Reached via the chat surface; tracked for an interaction recipe.
triggers.modules/knowledge-base/project-extension: Attach-KB picker Popover on the project knowledge drawer — opens on the 'Attach' button click. Panel rendered inside the project knowledge drawer; reached via a button interaction. Tracked.
triggers.modules/voice/components/InstalledModels: Inline delete-Confirm on an installed whisper model (same pattern as InstalledVersionsCard). Card rendered on the voice settings page; reached via a card action. Covered by the voice-settings-admin e2e; tracked.
